title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Salmon with Roast Vegetables
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring pan-seared Norwegian salmon paired with a variety of roast vegetables.

ingredients.name: Roast vegetables (carrots, Brussels sprouts, sweet potatoes)

instructions: Rinse the salmon fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the salmon with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer the skillet to the preheated oven.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Remove the skillet from the oven and serve the salmon with the roasted vegetables.
Squeeze a lemon wedge over the salmon, if desired.
